modules.module_title: Introduction to Pet Care, Dog Breeds, Behavior & Body Language
Canine Nutrition, Hydration, Feeding Schedules & Basic Health
Dog Grooming Tools, Bathing, Drying & De-shedding Techniques
Advanced Grooming: Haircutting, Styling, Nail Trimming & Ear Cleaning
Pet First Aid, Handling Parasites, Vaccinations & Emergency Care
Professional Ethics, Client Communication & Pet Care Business Setup

questions.question: Pet Care & Dog Grooming Professional ka primary role kya hota hai?

options.A: Pets ki physical cleaning, safety, styling (hair/nails) and behavior tracking me help karna
options.B: Only buying raw pet meat packages for sales
options.C: Performing clinical surgeries on pets independently
options.D: Teaching academic courses to pet owners

questions.explanation: Groomer ka primary focus pet ki hygiene maintenance, coat styling aur physical comfort details deliver karna hota hai.

questions.question: Dog body language check me, agar koi dog continuously tail tight tucked (poonch legs ke beech dabana) kare to kya signal hai?

options.A: Fear / Anxiety / Stress (darr aur ghabrahat)
options.B: Extreme happiness and playful mood

questions.explanation: Tucked poonch extreme nervousness aur darr ka classical sign hai. Companion ko gentle handling start karni chahiye.

questions.question: Dog grooming me bathing check standard rules ke according bath water temperature kya hona chahiye?

options.A: Lukewarm water (gumguma paani, comfortable to human wrist skin test)
options.B: Boiling hot water directly
options.C: Freezing cold water with ice cubes

questions.explanation: Boiling water canine skin ko severe dry burns kar sakta hai, aur extremely cold water shock trigger kar sakta hai. Lukewarm water safest hai.

questions.question: Dog nail trimming (nakhun kaatna) me 'Quick' (nakhun ke andar ki blood vessel) cut hone par kya problem hoti hai?

options.A: Severe bleeding and intense pain for dog (quick holds active blood vessels)
options.B: Nail grows faster instantly

questions.explanation: Quick nakhun ke base me nerve and blood line hoti hai. Isko cut karne se pain aur heavy bleeding hoti hai, styptic powder helps stop it.

questions.question: Canine nutrition checks me kis human food sweet product ko dogs ke liye highly toxic/poisonous mana jata hai?

options.A: Chocolate (contains theobromine which dogs cannot metabolize)
options.B: Boiled unsalted rice paste

questions.explanation: Chocolate me present theobromine chemical dogs ke nervous system aur cardiac system ko failure state me push kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Dog ear cleaning (kaan safai) me what is the standard safety rule to clean inner canals?

options.A: Wipe with cotton balls soaked in ear cleaner (never insert cotton buds/Q-tips deep inside canal)
options.B: Push sharp steel needles to clear dry wax
options.C: Pour direct running water inside ear canals

questions.explanation: Deep cotton swabs insert karne se dry wax drum me impact ho jata hai, and risk of eardrum punctures increases.

questions.question: Long hair breeds (like Shih Tzu / Lhasa Apso) me under-coat knots and mats prevent karne ke liye daily maintenance tool?

options.A: Slicker brush and metal comb detailing (nukheele brush se tangle clear karna)
options.B: Using rubber hand glove rubs only
options.C: Washing daily with soap without drying

questions.explanation: Slicker brushes long coats ki tangles aur mats ko ease out karte hain, avoiding painful skin pulling.

questions.question: Dog coat drying me high-velocity blow dryers use karte waqt blow heat controls kyu critical hai?

options.A: Prevents overheating and skin scalding (dogs have thinner skin margins than humans)
options.B: Dryers change coat color variations

questions.explanation: Too hot air stream dryer burn marks create karti hai, isliye medium warm ya cool air flows use kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Pet first aid checks me agar dog active bleeding wounds hold kare to emergency bleeding check step kya hai?

options.A: Apply direct pressure with clean gauze pad on wound (never wash bleeding wound with hot water)
options.B: Pour heavy spirit oil directly into cuts
options.C: Shake dog limbs continuously to stop circulation
options.D: Wait for natural blood dry for hours

questions.explanation: Direct compression standard capillary blood flows stop karta hai, helping blood clot build safely.

questions.question: Professional groomer ethics checks me client consent safety policies details did customer updates needed before styling cuts?

options.A: Yes, always verify coat style cuts lengths, get written medical permissions for dematting, and log pre-existing injuries
options.B: Change coat style anyway groomer prefers secretly
options.C: Charge extra money from client wallet without asking

questions.explanation: Ethical grooming demands client alignment on haircuts, avoiding disputes over shaved patches or dematting cuts.

questions.question: Grooming table operations 'Grooming Loop / Leash tie' why tied around dog neck on table?

options.A: Secures dog from jumping off high table and getting leg fractures or running slips
options.B: Loop is for training dog commands

questions.explanation: Restraint loops secure pets from sudden table slips, protecting them from limb injuries.

questions.question: Dog coat types 'Double Coat' (eg Husky / Golden Retriever) why shaving double coats is forbidden?

options.A: Ruins natural heat insulation insulation shields, increases sunburn risks and destroys coat texture forever
options.B: Shaving makes coat grow blue hamesha
options.C: Double coat dogs have zero skin below fur

questions.explanation: Undercoat keeps dogs cool in summers and warm in winters. Shaving locks heat, causing heat strokes.

questions.question: Nail trimming styptic powders composition why kept ready at groomer tables?

options.A: Styptic powder contains alum compounds that instantly clot blood vessels if nail quick is accidentally cut
options.B: Powder cleans nail stains

questions.explanation: Styptic compounds constrict capillary walls, halting minor nail cuts bleeding instantly.

questions.question: Groomer scissors types 'Thinning Shears' (dantedar kainchi) what is visual styling function?

options.A: Blends heavy coat lines, thins out bulky dense fur patches without leaving blunt scissor lines
options.B: Cuts straight solid nails of dogs

questions.explanation: Thinning shears have notch teeth, removing only 30-50% fur per cut to soften heavy coat lines.

questions.question: Grooming business setups 'Appointment Booking Logs' why daily slot margins are spaced out?

options.A: Allows sufficient time for table sanitization between pets, reducing stress levels of dogs and staff
options.B: Calculates government GST taxes

questions.explanation: Properly spaced bookings prevent dog crowds inside waiting lobbies, minimizing aggressive group barking events.

questions.question: Pet Care Dog Grooming professional role?

options.A: Pets ki physical cleaning, safety, styling (hair/nails) and behavior tracking me help karna
options.B: Only buying raw pet meat packages for sales
options.C: Performing clinical surgeries on pets independently
options.D: Teaching academic courses to pet owners

questions.explanation: Groomer ka primary focus pet ki hygiene maintenance, coat styling aur physical comfort details deliver karna hota hai.

options.A: Fear / Anxiety / Stress (darr aur ghabrahat)
options.B: Extreme happiness and playful mood

options.B: Using rubber hand glove rubs only

options.B: Pour heavy spirit oil directly into cuts

options.A: Yes, always verify coat style cuts lengths, get written medical permissions for dematting, and log pre-existing injuries

options.A: Secures dog from jumping off high table and getting leg fractures or running slips
options.B: Loop is for training dog commands

questions.explanation: Restraint loops secure pets from sudden table slips, protecting them from limb injuries.

options.A: Ruins natural heat insulation insulation shields, increases sunburn risks and destroys coat texture forever
options.B: Shaving makes coat grow blue hamesha
options.C: Double coat dogs have zero skin below fur

questions.explanation: Undercoat keeps dogs cool in summers and warm in winters. Shaving locks heat, causing heat strokes.

questions.question: Styptic powder alum clot quick?

options.A: Styptic powder contains alum compounds that instantly clot blood vessels if nail quick is accidentally cut
options.B: Powder cleans nail stains

questions.explanation: Styptic compounds constrict capillary walls, halting minor nail cuts bleeding instantly.

options.A: Blends heavy coat lines, thins out bulky dense fur patches without leaving blunt scissor lines
options.B: Cuts straight solid nails of dogs

questions.explanation: Thinning shears have notch teeth, removing only 30-50% fur per cut to soften heavy coat lines.

questions.question: Grooming slot book sanitization gaps?

options.A: Allows sufficient time for table sanitization between pets, reducing stress levels of dogs and staff
options.B: Calculates government GST taxes

questions.explanation: Properly spaced bookings prevent dog crowds inside waiting lobbies, minimizing aggressive group barking events.

questions.question: Canine medical safety 'Gastric Torsion / Bloat' why running dogs immediately after heavy food is restricted?

options.A: Can cause stomach twisting (GDV), shutting off blood supplies and risking fatal cardiac shock
options.B: Stomach twists cause permanent leg lameness
options.C: Food converts to toxic alcohol in stomach

questions.explanation: Bloat twists stomach channels under centrifugal motions, closing gas escape loops, demanding immediate ER surgeries.

questions.question: Dog grooming clipper blades 'Blade hot alerts' how to check blade safety during shearing run?

options.A: Touch metal blade to own forearm skin regularly (hot blades burn dog skin fast)
options.B: Observe color changes of metal
options.C: Spray water directly on active plugged clipper

questions.explanation: High friction heats steel blades over runs. regular checks and using coolant sprays prevent blade burns.

questions.question: Dog parasite checks 'Tick removal' what is the correct safety extraction tool method?

options.A: Grasp tick head close to skin using fine tweezers, pull straight out smoothly (avoid twisting or squeezing body)
options.B: Burn tick body using matches directly on skin
options.C: Apply paint thinners to choke tick off
options.D: Pop the tick using bare fingernails

questions.explanation: Squeezing forces toxic salivary fluids back into dog bloodstream. straight pulls with tweezers remove heads clean.

questions.question: Pet care updates 'Canine vaccination cycles' what is core Rabies vaccine schedule standard?

options.A: First shot at 12-16 weeks of age, followed by boosters (annually or triennially)
options.B: Only one vaccine shot in lifetime is enough
options.C: Vaccine given only if dog bites human

questions.explanation: Rabies is fatal viral zoonotic infection, regular boosters are legal mandates to protect pets and public health.

questions.question: Pet care agency bookkeeping 'Client waiver documentation' what legal clauses are captured?

options.A: Emergency medical treatment consent, veterinary contact details, and center liability exclusions for dematting skin cuts
options.B: Records client financial credit card limits

questions.explanation: Signed waivers authorize emergency veterinary runs if accidents occur on table, safeguarding pet life.

options.A: First shot at 12-16 weeks of age, followed by boosters (annually or triennially)
options.B: Only one vaccine shot in lifetime is enough
options.C: Vaccine given only if dog bites human

questions.explanation: Rabies is fatal viral zoonotic infection, regular boosters are legal mandates to protect pets and public health.

questions.question: Pet care client waiver?

options.A: Emergency medical treatment consent, veterinary contact details, and center liability exclusions for dematting skin cuts
options.B: Records client financial credit card limits

questions.explanation: Signed waivers authorize emergency veterinary runs if accidents occur on table, safeguarding pet life.

questions.question: Grooming tools 'Shedding blade' what is coat clearing function?

options.A: Removes loose dead hair undercoat blocks from dense short-coated breeds (eg Labradors, Pugs)
options.B: Shaves skin close to surface

questions.explanation: Loop metal shedding blades strip dead undercoat strands quickly, preventing heavy house carpet hair droppings.

questions.question: Pet care hygiene 'Flea control bathing' why water is applied around dog neck first during flea baths?

options.A: Blocks fleas from crawling up face, nose and inside ears when water hits body
options.B: Soothes dog brain waves
options.C: Flea shampoo works only on neck skin

questions.explanation: Fleas flee water streams. Wetting neck barrier first traps fleas on body areas where shampoo can kill them.

questions.question: Groomer safety checks 'Bite prevention muzzle usage' when is muzzle applied?

options.A: Only when dog displays growling aggressive signs or extreme panic responses on table
options.B: Muzzle every dog from entrance to exit always
options.C: Use muzzle to silence barking dogs only

questions.explanation: Muzzles prevent bite accidents, and are used temporarily for safety during stressful trims (eg nail cuts).

questions.question: Dog behavior monitoring 'Play bow posture' (chest flat on ground, tail high) what does it communicate?

options.A: Invitation to play and friendly social signals
options.B: Aggression threat warning

questions.explanation: Play bows are canine play signals, declaring actions are safe friendly interactions.

questions.question: Pet first aid 'Choking rescue' how Heimlich is applied to medium dogs?

options.A: Place hands behind ribs, compress upward inward below diaphragm while standing behind dog
options.B: Shake dog upside down by hind legs
options.D: Heimlich cannot be done on dogs

questions.explanation: Heimlich compression direction clears windpipe blocks, pushing out trapped toy pieces or bones.

questions.question: Shedding blade loop metal?

options.A: Removes loose dead hair undercoat blocks from dense short-coated breeds (eg Labradors, Pugs)
options.B: Shaves skin close to surface

questions.explanation: Loop metal shedding blades strip dead undercoat strands quickly, preventing heavy house carpet hair droppings.

options.C: Flea shampoo works only on neck skin

questions.explanation: Fleas flee water streams. Wetting neck barrier first traps fleas on body areas where shampoo can kill them.

questions.explanation: Muzzles prevent bite accidents, and are used temporarily for safety during stressful trims (eg nail cuts).

questions.question: Dog play bow friendly?

options.A: Invitation to play and friendly social signals
options.B: Aggression threat warning

questions.explanation: Play bows are canine play signals, declaring actions are safe friendly interactions.

questions.question: Pet first aid canine Heimlich?

options.A: Place hands behind ribs, compress upward inward below diaphragm while standing behind dog
options.B: Shake dog upside down by hind legs
options.D: Heimlich cannot be done on dogs

questions.explanation: Heimlich compression direction clears windpipe blocks, pushing out trapped toy pieces or bones.

questions.question: Grooming clipper blade sizes why standard '10 Blade' is used for groin sanitization cuts?

options.A: Leaves fur approx 1.6mm thin (safest blade to clear sensitive areas without clipper burn cuts)
options.B: Shaves bare skin like surgical blade
options.C: Leaves 2 inches of long fur patterns

questions.explanation: 10 blade provides optimal safe gap, clearing sanitary zones without nicking loose skin folds.

questions.question: Canine conditions 'Heat stroke warning signs' what are direct emergency indicators?

options.A: Heavy drooling, bright red gums, rapid panting, and weakness/collapse
options.B: Deep quiet sleeping hours

questions.explanation: Dogs cool down primarily by panting. Gums redness and high saliva drools indicate systemic overheating.

questions.question: Grooming table safety checks why dogs are never left unattended on table?

options.A: Dogs jump off table if startled, risking hanging by leash loop or bone fractures
options.B: Dogs will eat styling shears

questions.explanation: Startup panic can trigger table jump exits. Continuous hand contact keeps pets secure.

questions.question: Pet hydration checks 'Skin tenting test' how dehydration is detected?

options.A: Gently pinch scruff skin behind neck (if skin returns flat slow, pet is dehydrated)
options.B: Checks skin temperature only

questions.explanation: Dehydration drops skin elasticity. Scruff tenting is quick indicator of immediate water needs.

questions.question: Groomer client communication 'Pre-existing medical forms' why collect details?

options.A: Identifies heart murmurs, skin allergies, joint pains and vaccine status before table handling start
options.B: Checks owner banking credit limits

questions.explanation: Knowing pre-existing conditions prevents table injuries, alerting staff to use extra padding supports.

questions.question: GROIN sanitization 10 blade?

options.B: Shaves bare skin like surgical blade

questions.explanation: 10 blade provides optimal safe gap, clearing sanitary zones without nicking loose skin folds.

options.A: Dogs jump off table if startled, risking hanging by leash loop or bone fractures
options.B: Dogs will eat shadow tools

questions.explanation: Startup panic can trigger table jump exits. Continuous hand contact keeps pets secure.

questions.question: Ear grooming 'Canal plucking' why some poodle hair is plucked from inner canals?

options.A: Hair traps moisture and ear cleaners, causing chronic ear infections if not cleared
options.B: Plucking makes ears point straight

questions.explanation: Poodle ears grow hair inside canals. Plucking/trimming keeps canals dry, preventing bacterial damp rot.

questions.question: Canine parasitology 'Flea dirt checks' how to verify flea wastes on dog skin?

options.A: Collect black sand spots off coat, drop on wet tissue (if spots bleed red, they are flea feces)
options.B: Observe spots under UV lamps only
options.C: Flea dirt dissolves into white powder

questions.explanation: Flea dirt is digested blood. Water dissolves dry blood wastes, creating red dye halos on tissue paper.

questions.question: Groomer safety 'Carding undercoat' what tool strips dead hairs from wire-haired coats?

options.A: Stripping knives or stone blocks
options.B: Heavy straight shears

questions.explanation: Wire coats (eg Terriers) require manual pulling/carding of dead shafts, keeping wire coat textures coarse.

questions.question: Canine nutrition 'Aged seniors diet changes' what dietary adjustments apply?

options.A: Lower calories, easy-digest proteins, and joint supplements (glucosamine)
options.B: Higher fats and high bone marrow feeds
options.C: Sweet milk and cereal formulas only

questions.explanation: Senior dogs show slower metabolic rates and arthritis. Diet adjustments protect joints while avoiding obesity.

questions.question: Grooming salon operations 'Safety MSDS book' where kept?

options.A: Accessible wall cabinet near bath tubs (contains safety procedures for flea shampoo exposures)
options.B: Under lock in main corporate safes

questions.explanation: Material Safety Data Sheets must remain close to wash bays, helping staff respond if shampoo splashes strike eyes.

questions.question: Canal plucking poodle hair?

options.A: Hair traps moisture and ear cleaners, causing chronic ear infections if not cleared
options.B: Plucking makes ears point straight

questions.explanation: Poodle ears grow hair inside canals. Plucking/trimming keeps canals dry, preventing bacterial damp rot.

options.B: Under lock in main corporate safes

questions.explanation: Material Safety Data Sheets must remain close to wash bays, helping staff respond if shampoo splashes strike eyes.

questions.question: Canine dental care 'Tartar buildup prevention' how often should dog teeth be brushed?

options.A: Daily or at least 3 times weekly (using dog-safe enzymatic toothpaste, never human toothpaste)
options.B: Once a year during annual vet check only
options.D: Human toothpastes are safe for dogs

questions.explanation: Human toothpaste contains fluoride and foaming agents (xylitol) toxic to dogs. Enzymatic pastes clear plaque safely.

questions.question: Canine nutrition 'Obesity risks' which ingredient percentage is checked in diet reduction food?

options.A: High crude fiber, low crude fat percentage (helps dog feel full on fewer calories)
options.B: High sugar and high grain ratios

questions.explanation: Fiber increases food volume bulk without adding calories, regulating weight without hunger pangs.

questions.question: Dog grooming setups 'Demattings' why heavy matted coats are often shaved rather than combed?

options.A: Combing pulls skin painfully, splits skin fibers and risks severe skin infections
options.B: Shaving fur makes it grow back faster
options.C: Shaved skin is cooler in winters

questions.explanation: Trying to brush dense mats pulls skin, causing bruising. Shaving below mats is standard pain-free rescue.

questions.question: Pet first aid checks 'Artificial respiration CPR' how many chest compressions per minute for medium dogs?

options.A: 100 to 120 compressions per minute (with breaths every 15 compressions)
options.B: Only 10 compressions per minute
options.D: CPR is not performed on canines

questions.explanation: Standard dog CPR compression rates match human parameters, maximizing oxygen transport.

questions.question: Groomer business setups 'Injury logs registers' why injuries to dogs on table are written down immediately?

options.A: Serves as legal record, outlines first aid given, and acts as insurance verification proof
options.B: Calculates monthly tax deductions

questions.explanation: Logging knicks and cuts immediately secures salon accountability, protecting staff from hidden legal claims.

questions.question: Canine dental enzymatic toothpaste?

options.A: Daily or at least 3 times weekly (using dog-safe enzymatic toothpaste, never human toothpaste)
options.B: Once a year during annual vet check only
options.D: Human toothpastes are safe for dogs

questions.explanation: Human toothpaste contains fluoride and foaming agents (xylitol) toxic to dogs. Enzymatic pastes clear plaque safely.

options.B: High sugar and high grain ratios

questions.explanation: Fiber increases food volume bulk without adding calories, regulating weight without hunger pangs.

options.B: Shaving fur makes it grow back faster
options.C: Shaved skin is cooler in winters

questions.question: Groomer injury log registers?

options.A: Serves as legal record, outlines first aid given, and acts as insurance verification proof
options.B: Calculates monthly tax deductions

questions.explanation: Logging knicks and cuts immediately secures salon accountability, protecting staff from hidden legal claims.

questions.question: Dog grooming styling 'Teddy Bear Cut' what breed is it typically styled on?

options.A: Poodles and Poodle-mixes (like Goldendoodles, Cockapoos)
options.B: Siberian Huskies only

questions.explanation: Teddy Bear cut trims facial fur round and leaves legs fluffy, matching poodle curly hair textures.

questions.question: Grooming salon sanitation 'Parvovirus disinfection' what disinfectant dilution is effective?

options.A: 1:32 bleach to water ratio (or specialized virucidal cleaner certified for Parvovirus)
options.B: Plain warm water spray only

questions.explanation: Parvovirus is highly resilient. Standard soaps fail; chlorine bleach ratios or virucidal cleaners are mandatory to prevent disease spreads.

questions.question: Dog nail trimming checks what is 'Dewclaw'?

options.A: Fifth nail located on inner side of leg above wrist (can curl grow into skin if missed)
options.B: Nail tip located on tail end

questions.explanation: Dewclaws do not touch ground, so they don't wear down naturally. Missed trims cause them to curl and puncture leg skins.

questions.question: Canine healthcare checks 'Normal gum color' what indicates good circulation?

options.A: Bubblegum pink (returns to pink within 2 seconds of finger pressure release - CRT test)
options.B: Dry pale white or bluish gums

questions.explanation: Pink moist gums show healthy blood oxygenations. Pale/blue alerts shock or cardiorespiratory emergencies.

questions.question: Grooming business setups 'No-show cancellation boundaries' why rules are declared?

options.A: Protects salon bookings slots, ensuring stable daily income profiles and staff payouts
options.B: Calculates local business tax brackets

questions.explanation: Enforcing booking cancellation guidelines secures staff roster hours, optimizing daily salon margins.

questions.question: Poodles teddy bear cut?

options.A: Poodles and Poodle-mixes (like Goldendoodles, Cockapoos)
options.B: Siberian Huskies only

questions.explanation: Teddy Bear cut trims facial fur round and leaves legs fluffy, matching poodle curly hair textures.

questions.question: Parvovirus disinfection bleach 1:32?

options.A: 1:32 bleach to water ratio (or specialized virucidal cleaner certified for Parvovirus)
options.B: Plain warm water spray only

questions.explanation: Parvovirus is highly resilient. Standard soaps fail; chlorine bleach ratios or virucidal cleaners are mandatory to prevent disease spreads.

questions.question: Dewclaw fifth inner nail?

options.A: Fifth nail located on inner side of leg above wrist (can curl grow into skin if missed)
options.B: Nail tip located on tail end

questions.explanation: Dewclaws do not touch ground, so they don't wear down naturally. Missed trims cause them to curl and puncture leg skins.

questions.question: Normal gum color pink CRT?

options.A: Bubblegum pink (returns to pink within 2 seconds of finger pressure release - CRT test)
options.B: Dry pale white or bluish gums

questions.explanation: Pink moist gums show healthy blood oxygenations. Pale/blue alerts shock or cardiorespiratory emergencies.

questions.question: Grooming salon cancellation bookings?

options.A: Protects salon bookings slots, ensuring stable daily income profiles and staff payouts
options.B: Calculates local business tax brackets

questions.explanation: Enforcing booking cancellation guidelines secures staff roster hours, optimizing daily salon margins.

questions.question: Pet Care & Dog Grooming Basics final launch audits why veterinary contact list is key final step?

options.A: Ensures immediate access to emergency vet services if dog suffers injury or shock on table
options.B: Video editing file sizes compression

questions.explanation: Confirming emergency vet coordinates secures animal health, validating salon risk compliance standards.

questions.question: Dog tail tucked behavior checks?

options.A: Fear / Anxiety / Stress (darr aur ghabrahat)
options.B: Extreme happiness and playful mood

questions.explanation: Tucked poonch extreme nervousness aur darr ka classical sign hai. Companion ko gentle handling start karni chahiye.

questions.question: Dog bath lukewarm checks comfort?

options.A: Lukewarm water (gumguma paani, comfortable to human wrist skin test)
options.B: Boiling hot water directly
options.C: Freezing cold water with ice cubes

questions.explanation: Boiling water canine skin ko severe dry burns kar sakta hai, aur extremely cold water shock trigger kar sakta hai. Lukewarm water safest hai.

questions.question: Dog nail trim quick bleeding vessel?

options.A: Severe bleeding and intense pain for dog (quick holds active blood vessels)
options.B: Nail grows faster instantly

questions.explanation: Quick nakhun ke base me nerve and blood line hoti hai. Isko cut karne se pain aur heavy bleeding hoti hai, styptic powder helps stop it.

questions.question: Dog chocolate toxic theobromine?

options.A: Chocolate (contains theobromine which dogs cannot metabolize)
options.B: Boiled unsalted rice paste

questions.explanation: Chocolate me present theobromine chemical dogs ke nervous system aur cardiac system ko failure state me push kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Dog ear cotton ball cleaning?

options.A: Wipe with cotton balls soaked in ear cleaner (never insert cotton buds/Q-tips deep inside canal)
options.B: Push sharp steel needles to clear dry wax
options.C: Pour direct running water inside ear canals

questions.explanation: Deep cotton swabs insert karne se dry wax drum me impact ho jata hai, and risk of eardrum punctures increases.

questions.question: Slicker brush tangle dematting daily?

options.A: Slicker brush and metal comb detailing (nukheele brush se tangle clear karna)
options.B: Using rubber hand glove rubs only
options.C: Washing daily with soap without drying

questions.explanation: Slicker brushes long coats ki tangles aur mats ko ease out karte hain, avoiding painful skin pulling.

questions.question: HV dryer heat skin burns checks?

options.A: Prevents overheating and skin scalding (dogs have thinner skin margins than humans)
options.B: Dryers change coat color variations

questions.explanation: Too hot air stream dryer burn marks create karti hai, isliye medium warm ya cool air flows use kiye jate hain.

questions.question: Pet cut direct pressure gauze?

options.A: Apply direct pressure with clean gauze pad on wound (never wash bleeding wound with hot water)
options.B: Pour heavy spirit oil directly into cuts
options.C: Shake dog limbs continuously to stop circulation
options.D: Wait for natural blood dry for hours

questions.explanation: Direct compression standard capillary blood flows stop karta hai, helping blood clot build safely.

questions.question: Leash loop tie table safety jumps?

options.A: Secures dog from jumping off high table and getting leg fractures or running slips
options.B: Loop is for training dog commands

questions.explanation: Restraint loops secure pets from sudden table slips, protecting them from limb injuries.
